entity.home_jurisdiction_name.label: FIRST: The name of the limited liability partnership* (in its home jurisdiction)

entity.is_professional_llp.label: SECOND: (Check box only if applicable) This is a professional limited liability partnership** qualified pursuant to 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A

entity.professional_services_description.label: SECOND: (used only when checkbox 18 is set) provide the following professional services:

entity.maine_fictitious_name.label: THIRD: …the fictitious name under which it proposes to apply for authority to do business in the State of Maine is

entity.professional_partners_licensed_st.label: FOURTH (For a professional LLP only): All of the professional limited liability partnership's partners are licensed in one or more states to render the professional services for which it has been formed

entity.principal_office.physical_address.label: FIFTH: Address of the registered or principal office, wherever located, is: (physical location - street (not P.O. Box), city, state and zip code)

entity.principal_office.mailing_address.label: (mailing address if different from above) [principal office]

entity.maine_business_purpose.label: SIXTH: The nature of the business or purposes to be conducted or promoted in the State of Maine is

registered_agent.name.label: Commercial path: (name of commercial registered agent)

registered_agent.physical_address.label: Noncommercial path: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)

registered_agent.mailing_address.label: Noncommercial path: (mailing address if different from above)

entity.maine_activities_start_date.label: TENTH: The date on which the foreign limited liability partnership first did, or intends to do, business in the State of Maine is
